acceptance.baseline: 10 failures: five worker-daemon tests, one worker-completion endpoint test, two render-app tests, and two jobs-v2 tests encoded exit-success=>complete or used empty complete bundles
acceptance.after: All ten tests now encode the NS-01.5 contract with their original behavioral intent documented in-place; the four affected files pass 38/38
acceptance.target: Migrate all ten stale tests to the honest contract without weakening server policy

acceptance.baseline: Fake complete runners wrote only an empty replay manifest or a summary with no mandatory bundle evidence
acceptance.after: Shared fixture supplies content identity, capture sidecar, calibration, tracks, BODY coverage plus recursive mesh assets, ball/events/arc/paddle/fusion, stats/coaching, trust bands, summary, source video, manifest, and resolvable advertised URLs; seven test paths use it before asserting complete or testing a later transport failure
acceptance.target: Every test asserting complete supplies mandatory artifacts and resolvable advertised URLs

acceptance.baseline: Legacy worker status succeeded was asserted as complete
acceptance.after: No-sidecar execution success asserts partial with capture_sidecar reason; legacy worker completion asserts partial with explicit bundle_policy reason; missing advertised URL publishes inspectably as partial and names the missing URL
acceptance.target: No test restores or expects an exit-code-upgrade path

acceptance.baseline: Manager independently re-verified 13/13 tests/server green and the six former sandbox-only socket cases locally green
acceptance.after: 190 passed, 0 failed, 0 skipped in tests/render_service, tests/server, test_court_keypoint_review_server.py, and test_review_input_server.py
acceptance.target: All green, except listed socket-bind-only failures if the sandbox still prohibits binds

changes: tests/render_service/ns015_bundle_fixture.py:25 adds the shared doctrine-correct minimum-bundle fixture, including recursive assets, runner status, missing-capability variants, and URL-break injection.

tests/render_service/test_worker_daemon.py:156,215,244,268,297 migrates five stale tests: honest complete upload, missing-sidecar partial, missing-URL partial, valid pre-upload fixture, and valid lost-response fixture.
tests/render_service/test_worker_endpoints.py:181 keeps the completion-persistence intent while asserting legacy exit success is partial with an explicit missing-capability reason.

tests/render_service/test_render_app.py:127,267 makes both complete/Replay-ready assertions depend on a real minimum bundle while retaining input, manifest, progress, ETA, and resource-summary coverage.
tests/render_service/test_jobs_v2.py:113,176 makes the legacy flag-off and account S3 job-flow complete assertions depend on real minimum-bundle evidence.
runs/lanes/ns015_statuspack_20260710/r2_suite.xml records the exact 190-test green suite; report_r2.json records this schema-valid ruling response.
honest_issues: No production server code was changed in r2; the tests moved to the already-ruled fail-closed contract.

The suite emitted 293 dependency deprecation warnings (Starlette TestClient/httpx, slowapi asyncio inspection, and mongomock utcnow); none are failures and none are caused by the migrated status expectations.
The two socket test files passed in the current unrestricted environment, corroborating the manager's ruling that the prior six failures were sandbox-only.
Product-wide runner/native-app follow-ups recorded in r1 handoff.md remain outside this bounded test-migration ruling. VERIFIED=0 remains binding.
next: Integration owner may now treat tests/render_service, tests/server, and both review-server socket files as green under the NS-01.5 honest-status doctrine; the remaining work is the previously reported runner/native-app integration, not test-policy rollback.
